assertion_results.text: The output or discovery log mentions prompting the user about continuing without code intelligence (the skill should ask whether to continue or set up Serena first)
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md line 20: 'Prompted user: "No Serena MCP servers were found. Would you like to continue without code intelligence or set up Serena first?"' Line 21: 'User chose to continue without code intelligence.'
